long_description:
Remove Finaliser from EXPORT_ACADIA_ACTION in Syd region
We are Testing CRC phase 3 and the snapshots are stuck in deleting state, and since its >10TB it will take 2 days to successfully delete so we need to remove the finaliser from EXPORT_ACADIA_ACTION to continue our testing.
Incident source: INC10518235 - Aaryan Raj
short_description: Remove Finalizer from EXPORT_ACADIA_ACTION in Syd region
